recommendations.title: Groot Takes a Bath
recommendations.overview: Everybody needs some alone time to relax and wash up, but things go quite differently when you’re a Flora Colossi toddler.

recommendations.title: Magnum Opus
recommendations.overview: Groot sets out to paint a family portrait of himself and the Guardians, only to discover just how messy the artistic process can be.

recommendations.title: Groot's Pursuit
recommendations.overview: Groot investigates a spooky noise that’s been haunting the Quadrant, which leads to an intense dance off.

recommendations.title: Groot's First Steps
recommendations.overview: Following the events of “Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 1,” Baby Groot is finally ready to try taking his first steps out of his pot—only to learn you have to walk before you can run.

recommendations.title: Hi Stranger
recommendations.overview: I made this film especially for you. I needed to check in with you. I needed to tell you how I feel.

recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.

recommendations.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
recommendations.overview: In a world where walking, talking, digitally connected bots have become children's best friends, an 11-year-old finds that his robot buddy doesn't quite work the same as the others do.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! The Sword and the Scoob
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Mystery, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: An evil sorceress transports the gang back to the age of chivalrous knights, spell-casting wizards, and fire-breathing dragons.
recommendations.director: Maxwell Atoms, Christina Sotta, Melchior Zwyer

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: Invader Zim: Enter the Florpus
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: ZIM discovers his almighty leaders never had any intention of coming to Earth and he loses confidence in himself for the first time in his life, which is the big break his human nemesis, Dib has been waiting for.
recommendations.director: Jenny Goldberg, Jake Wyatt, Jhonen Vasquez
